title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Victory Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeated NC State 81-74 in the ACC Tournament, led by Malik Thomas' 16 points.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's win secures their advancement in the ACC Tournament, impacting their postseason aspirations.

title: Virginia Secures ACC Tournament Win Against NC State
summary: Virginia defeated NC State for the third time this season with a score of 81-74 in the ACC Tournament.
charlotte_impact: This victory strengthens Virginia's position in the ACC Tournament and boosts team morale.

title: Virginia and NC State Face Off in ACC Tournament Quarterfinals
summary: Virginia plays NC State in the quarterfinal round of the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: This game is a critical step for both teams in their quest for the ACC Tournament title.

title: NC State vs. Virginia: ACC Tournament Preview
summary: Preview of the NC State Wolfpack versus No. 11 Virginia Cavaliers in the ACC Tournament quarterfinal.
charlotte_impact: The outcome of this game will significantly impact each team's tournament journey.

title: False School Shooting Report Triggers Lockdown at NCSSM
summary: A hoax report of gunfire caused a lockdown at NC School of Science and Math's Morganton campus.
charlotte_impact: False reports disrupt education and cause unnecessary panic, highlighting the need for better verification.

title: Approaching the First 90° Day of the Year
summary: High temperatures are expected to reach the upper 80s to near 90 degrees, approaching a record.
charlotte_impact: Rising temperatures may impact outdoor activities and increase energy consumption.

title: Fatal Shooting in Rock Hill Under Investigation
summary: A 21-year-old died in a shooting on Springdale Road and Sturgis Road; York County Sheriff's Office investigating.
charlotte_impact: This incident underscores the ongoing issue of gun violence and its devastating consequences.

title: Man Charged with Murder in Northwest Charlotte Case
summary: A man was charged with murder after a 24-year-old was found dead off Belmeade Drive and Mount Holly Road.
charlotte_impact: This incident highlights the severity of violent crime in the Charlotte area.

title: Stabbing in East Charlotte Leaves One Injured
summary: One person was hospitalized with minor injuries after a stabbing on Winding Cedar Trail in east Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: The stabbing raises concerns about public safety and the potential for further violence.

title: Firefighter Injured, Family Displaced in Huntersville House Fire
summary: A garage fire on Fremington Road spread to a home, injuring a firefighter and displacing three residents.
charlotte_impact: This incident highlights the dangers faced by firefighters and the impact of fires on families.

title: CMPD Cracks Down on Street Takeover, Seizes Guns and Drugs
summary: Charlotte-Mecklenburg Police halted a street takeover and seized firearms and narcotics in a targeted operation.
charlotte_impact: This operation demonstrates law enforcement's commitment to combating illegal activities.

title: Pedestrian Seriously Injured in East Charlotte Collision
summary: A pedestrian is hospitalized with life-threatening injuries after being struck by a vehicle in east Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: This incident underscores the need for increased pedestrian safety measures.

title: Fatal House Fire in Stanly County
summary: A house fire in Stanly County resulted in one fatality; the cause is under investigation.
charlotte_impact: This tragic event highlights the importance of fire safety and prevention.

title: Crash on I-485 Causes Delays Near South Boulevard
summary: A vehicle crash on I-485 Inner Loop near South Boulevard closed three lanes, causing delays.
charlotte_impact: Traffic incidents can disrupt commutes and impact local transportation.

title: Chesterfield County Man Charged After Allegedly Shooting at Deputy
summary: Jonathan Ross McCaskill faces charges after allegedly firing at a deputy in Patrick, South Carolina.
charlotte_impact: This incident highlights the dangers faced by law enforcement officers.
